dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THIS EPISODE CONTAINS DEPICTIONS OF VIOLENCE THAT MAY BE UPSETTING FOR SOME READERS.

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: WHERE DID IT GO? It WAS RIGHT HERE JUST NOW!

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: MOVE! I'M GOING TO CATCH IT!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dokja
dialogue.line: SORRY, I WORK ALONE.

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: WELL, THAT IS A BUMMER.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: If I teamed up with Namwoon Kim, my survival would be guaranteed for now. If I hadn't read TWSA, I probably would have made a different choice. But I am a reader who knows about him and his future. And after seeing him in person...

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: THEN GET OUT OF MY WAY! I HAVE SOME UNFINISHED BUSINESS WITH THAT GRANNY! I CAN'T LET THE BUG I CAUGHT ESCAPE FROM MY GRASP!

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: WHAT? ARE YOU TRYING TO ACT LIKE A HERO NOW? OR DO YOU HAVE A SPLIT PERSONALITY? JEEZ, YOU KNOW-IT-ALLS ARE ALL THE SAME!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I realized how much I hated his character in TWSA. Think about it. You teenager, be a right forever. People like you make me sick.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [NAMWOON KIM DESPISES YOU]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOUR AFFINITY TOWARDS NAMWOON KIM HAS SLIGHTLY DECREASED]

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: I SAID: MOVE!

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: LOOK AT YOU. YOU'RE NOT HALF BAD.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I knew you would make that move. This guy is exactly how I imagined he would be.

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: HOW ABOUT THIS?

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dokja
dialogue.line: T-THAT IS... THE SKILL OF THE EDGELORD ATTRIBUTE...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: <SKILL> GRIMDARK AWAKENING LV. 1

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dokja
dialogue.line: HE ALREADY ACTIVATED HIS SKILL!

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: WHAT IS THIS? I'M SO F#KING STRONG!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: This is probably why the protagonist still recruited him although he is like a psychopath.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOUR UNDERSTANDING OF NAMWOON KIM HAS INCREASED]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Should I use that now?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE UNLOCKED LEVEL 1 OF YOUR PERSONAL SKILL, OMNISCIENT READER'S VIEWPOINT!]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Huh? Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint? What exactly is that?

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: DAMN IT! WHERE DID ALL THE F#KING INSECTS GO?

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dokja
dialogue.line: W-WHAT? WHAT IS GOING ON?

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: AHHH! FUCK!

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: WHY AREN'T YOU GETTING HIT?!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dokja
dialogue.line: TRY ALL YOU WANT, BUT YOU WON'T BE ABLE TO HIT ME.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [LEVEL 1 OF OMNISCIENT READER'S VIEWPOINT ACTIVATED!]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As soon as my second skill [Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint] was activated, I knew what he was going to do. It was like I could read his mind.

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: OH, FUCKING HELL! YOU SLIMY LITTLE JERK!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But all I can do is dodge his attacks. Retaliating isn't possible. I just need to hold on a little longer.

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: TWO MINUTES LEFT, KID! FUCK!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: If that old lady dies, Namwoon will clear the scenario. Whatever happens, I can't let someone like him move onto the next scenario!

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: HAHA, I KNEW YOU WOULD MAKE THAT MOVE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: <SKILL> KNIFE FIGHTING LV. 1

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: ARGH! It HURTS! LIKE MY SKIN IS BURNING!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Now that I think about it, he's a military geek!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Death is just around the corner. If I lose to Namwoon Kim, am I going to die here too? This is a world that is simply based on survival of the fittest. No, the world has always been like this. According to the law of the jungle, the strong prey on the weak. Nothing has really changed. Rather, that rule has just become clearer. I must also adhere to that rule if I want to survive. Come on, Mr. Smarty-Pants.

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: You don't have the strength to run anymore. Do me a favor, and let's just get this over with. We're running out of time.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: If I hesitate, Namwoon Kim, second-year student at Cheongil High School. Is an insect egg also an organism?

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: WHAT? WHAT THE HELL ARE YOU SUDDENLY TALKING ABOUT?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The answer is... YES.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU OBTAINED 100 BONUS COINS]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE KILLED A LIVING ORGANISM]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU OBTAINED 100 BONUS COINS]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE KILLED A LIVING ORGANISM]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU OBTAINED 100 BONUS COINS]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE KILLED A LIVING ORGANISM]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU OBTAINED 100 BONUS COINS]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE KILLED A LIVING ORGANISM]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU OBTAINED 100 BONUS COINS]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE KILLED A LIVING ORGANISM]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU OBTAINED 100 BONUS COINS]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE KILLED A LIVING ORGANISM]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU OBTAINED 100 BONUS COINS]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE KILLED A LIVING ORGANISM]

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: HOW AM I SUPPOSED TO KNOW THAT?!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE OBTAINED COINS: WOULD YOU LIKE A TUTORIAL ON COIN USAGE?]

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dokja
dialogue.line: SKIP! AND I WILL INVEST 2,700 COINS IN MY STAMINA!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [INVESTING 2,700 COINS IN STAMINA]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [STAMINA LV: 1 -> STAMINA LV: 10]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [STAMINA LEVEL HAS BEEN CONSIDERABLY ENHANCED!]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOUR PHYSICAL DURABILITY HAS GREATLY INCREASED!]

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: WHAT..? HOW..??

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Grasshoppers lay more than 100 eggs at a time during mating season.

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: W-WHAT? I'M NOT THE ONE WHO'S GOING TO DIE. P-PLEASE! DAMN IT! WHERE IS IT? YOU ARE!

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: HA. FUCK. DIE! DIE YOU ASSHOLE!

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: WHY WON'T YOU DIE?!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOUR TIME HAS RUN OUT: PROCEEDING WITH CHECKOUT:]

dialogue.speaker: Namwoon Kim
dialogue.line: AHHHH! NOW! OGH!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [MAIN SCENARIO #1 PROVE YOUR VALUE HAS ENDED]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [NUMBER OF SURVIVORS IN CABIN NUMBER 3807 OF TRAIN NUMBER 3434 TO BULGWANG: 5]

summary: Kim Dokja confronts Namwoon Kim, who is attempting to kill an old woman to clear the scenario. Dokja uses his newly acquired 'Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint' skill to predict and dodge Namwoon's attacks, eventually defeating him by exploiting his knowledge of insect biology and investing coins to boost his stamina, thus clearing the first main scenario.
